notes.hypothesis: A final vigorous wipe/air-dry pass should show whether any additional dry-air headroom remains beyond the previous full-wipe captures.
notes.method: All four probes were wiped/air-dried again and captured for 60 s at 0.5 s cadence in open-bench dry condition.
notes.findings: Medians were s1 3089, s2 3123, s3 3125, s4 3131 raw ADC. Ranges remained narrow; CRC failures were 1. The dry values stayed in the same roughly 3090-3130 endpoint region.
notes.conclusion: Additional wiping did not expose a materially higher dry endpoint. For these probes under this setup, the practical dry-air region is about 3090-3130 raw ADC, with per-channel offsets still important.
